code: import{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{supabase}from'../lib/supabase';import{CheckInCodeInput}from'../components/features/points/CheckInCodeInput';import{RevealOnScrollWrapper}from'../components/common/RevealOnScrollWrapper';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Points(){const[points,setPoints]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState(null);const fetchPoints=async()=>{try{const{data:{user}}=await supabase.auth.getUser();if(!user){setError('Please sign in to view your points');return;}const{data,error}=await supabase.from('user_points').select('points').eq('user_id',user.id).single();if(error)throw error;setPoints((data===null||data===void 0?void 0:data.points)||0);}catch(err){console.error('Error fetching points:',err);setError('Failed to fetch points');}finally{setLoading(false);}};useEffect(()=>{fetchPoints();},[]);if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading..."});if(error)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:["Error: ",error]});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(RevealOnScrollWrapper,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container mx-auto px-4 py-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-3xl font-bold mb-8",children:"Points"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-6",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-2xl font-bold mb-4",children:"Your Points"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-4xl font-bold text-indigo-600",children:points})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CheckInCodeInput,{onPointsAdded:fetchPoints})})]})]})});}
